anti_claims: This paper-module JSON row does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or whole-system completeness.
Legacy Markdown presence is not treated as source authority or as typed subject evidence.
Capsule-backed subject/code edges are structural references only; they do not prove implementation correctness.

compression.authority_ceiling: Public synthetic governed-mutation receipts and copied non-secret macro body digest evidence only; no standing credential authority, live cloud/account mutation, source mutation, provider call, hidden vote, policy-after-execution authority, benchmark security claim, release approval, publication, hosting, or whole-system correctness.
compression.card: Proof-Derived Governed Mutation Authorization is the public mutation-authority replay contract. It checks three synthetic proposals, proof-cell validator refs, visible policy verdicts, side-effect logs, rollback receipts, cold replay, eight negative cases, and six exact copied macro pattern/receipt/control-plane bodies while keeping credentials, proof bodies, provider payloads, account refs, source mutation, and release authority out of receipts.
compression.one_line: The public proof-derived governed-mutation fixture validates synthetic mutation proposals through proof cells, visible pre-execution policy verdicts, logged side effects, rollback receipts, cold replay, negative cases, and copied non-secret macro control-plane bodies without granting live mutation authority.
